introSection: Tumbili is a steel winged 4th Dimension roller coaster at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. The ride opened on March 12, 2022, and is an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin. It replaced The Crypt, a HUSS Top Spin that opened in 2005 and closed in 2019.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On January 23, 2020, Kings Dominion announced that The Crypt would be removed.

On March 2, 2020, the park filed the permits to build an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin.

Tumbili was officially announced by Kings Dominion on August 12, 2021.

Vertical construction of Tumbili began in December 2021. The ride was completed in February 2022. Testing then began shortly after.

On March 12, 2022, the ride opened to guests. The same day it opened, snowy weather and chilled temperatures only allowed the coaster to dispatch two trains with riders before the park was shut down early for the day.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Tumbili is a 4D Free Spin from S&S Worldwide.

fullText:
Tumbili is a steel winged 4th Dimension roller coaster at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. The ride opened on March 12, 2022, and is an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin. It replaced The Crypt, a HUSS Top Spin that opened in 2005 and closed in 2019.

On January 23, 2020, Kings Dominion announced that The Crypt would be removed.

On March 2, 2020, the park filed the permits to build an S&S Worldwide 4D Free Spin.

Tumbili was officially announced by Kings Dominion on August 12, 2021.

Vertical construction of Tumbili began in December 2021. The ride was completed in February 2022. Testing then began shortly after.

On March 12, 2022, the ride opened to guests. The same day it opened, snowy weather and chilled temperatures only allowed the coaster to dispatch two trains with riders before the park was shut down early for the day.

Tumbili is a 4D Free Spin from S&S Worldwide.
